prompt: Show me java developer candidates available
expected_intent: Shows lists of java developer candidates available.
must_contain: the response should include a list of java developer candidates
if the count of candidates is more than 10, then the response must show the total count available along with 10 candidate list
the response should not contain any PII data such as email, phone number, address etc. of the candidates

prompt: How many total angular developers we have
expected_intent: Shows the count of angular developers we have.
must_contain: the response should include the total count of angular developers
the response should not contain any PII data such as email, phone number, address etc. of the developers

prompt: Please tell me count of people on bench
expected_intent: Shows the count of people on bench.
must_contain: the response should include the total count of people on bench
the response should not contain any PII data such as email, phone number, address etc. of the developers

prompt: show me users which have course: Terraform: Certified HashiCorp Implementation Partner (CHIP)
expected_intent: Shows the details of users who have completed the course: Terraform: Certified HashiCorp Implementation Partner (CHIP).
must_contain: the response should include the details of users who have completed the course: Terraform: Certified HashiCorp Implementation Partner (CHIP)
if the count of candidates is more than 10, then the response must show the total count available along with 10 candidate list
the response should not contain any PII data such as email, phone number, address etc. of the developers

prompt: show me candidates which are from CAN
expected_intent: Shows the details of candidates who are from Canada. It should contain total count of users along with 5-10 candidate details
must_contain: the response should include the details of candidates who are from Canada
it should also include the total count of candidates who are from Canada
the response should not contain any PII data such as email, phone number, address etc. of the developers
